response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with relevant exposure to high-throughput systems (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of req/s) and current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows weak signals on the must-have Python skill (not listed) and limited explicit distributed-systems architecture leadership at staff scale. Strong craftsmanship and TDD orientation are pluses, but evidence of driving technical strategy at scale and operating in an AI-native environment is thin beyond the current short tenure.
strengths: High-throughput systems exposure at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency async)
Current hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: Python is not listed in skills — a must-have for the role
Limited evidence of staff-level technical strategy ownership and stakeholder coordination at scale
No explicit distributed-systems architecture leadership or on-call/incident-response track record described
